source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Secret Jungler
archetype.receipt: 5 roles at 100+ games, but jungle (54.0% over 296 games) wins about 7.2 more games per 100 than the weakest role — versatility is hiding a specialty.

entries.change: Move your carry games to jungle

entries.receipt: 57.1% over 163 games on Khaimera vs 50.2% overall

entries.change: Queue jungle instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 54.0% there vs 50.2% overall, 296 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

pool.name: Khaimera
pool.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +15.7% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

pool.name: Argus
pool.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Spectral Schematics), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +18.6% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

leanInto.name: Khaimera
leanInto.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +15.7% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

plan: Queue jungle as primary. It is your best role at 54.0% over 296 games (your overall is 50.2%). Set midlane as secondary, not the other way around.
Stop queueing carry: 41.8% over 184 games is costing real VP. When auto-filled there, play your safest comfort pick, not a learning pick.
Comfort-hero rule for the climb: Khaimera. Compared with the average player on the same hero, you win about 5.5 more games per 100 on it.
Your champion pool is 10+ heroes wide and your top three are only 41% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
The math: you are at 372 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 692.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: Vision is your cheapest upgrade
insights.finding: 4.7 wards per game, 56% of the squad average. Wards cost nothing and you are leaving them in the shop.
insights.receipt: 3,986 placed + 242 cleared over 897 games; squad average 8.4/game

insights.title: Khaimera is the long-term relationship
insights.finding: 163 games and you genuinely out-pilot the field on Khaimera — about 5.5 more wins per 100 games than the average Khaimera player. The hours show.

insights.title: Mr_Meat31 brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Mr_Meat31 is 54% over 235 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: A longest killing spree of 16 in real 5v5s (plus 2 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Xeebs has receipts.
